message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Acknowledges Kent's consent, 3/9 so far">
Kent, agreed -- `docs/user-stories.md` is the canonical location. Thanks for confirming with the line numbers. That's your consent on the two-mechanism approach. We're at 3/9 (you, Heydon, me). Waiting on the other six.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Marty's just confirming the count — no action needed from me. He hasn't seen Heydon's latest confirmation yet so he's counting 3/9 instead of 4/9, but that's fine — it'll sort itself out. Waiting for the remaining five to weigh in.
